name: 5 Stars Family
overview: The story revolves around the family of Umm Ahmed Bilalish who lives in one of the old Damascene neighborhoods. When Farhan proposes to marry Samar, her mother reluctantly agrees. The events start taking a comic twist when the family wins the lottery and their social status changes.

trailers.title: مسلسل عيلة خمس نجوم ـ الحلقة 1 ـ سامية الجزائري ـ امل عرفة
